text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite not feeling great lately, Eishin Flash
agrees to visit a shrine with me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wunderschön... What a calming atmosphere. The
air here feels sacred.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems the proper sequence for praying is to
bow twice, clap twice, and bow one last time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A proper bow is ninety degrees. I have prepared a
shiny five yen coin as an offering as well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. In fact, there are still many things I
failed to ascertain.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For example, how many seconds should I hold my
bow?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And how many seconds would "feel right" in this
case?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I also do not know how quickly I should bow, nor
how long I should keep my head down.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Without that information, I will not be able pray
properly. What to do...
choice_data_list: Just stay calm, and you'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So calmness is the most important thing here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I see... Indeed, a tranquil heart is vital when
offering prayers to the divine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I shall do my best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash does everything perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Did I do everything correctly?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was able to pay my respects with a calm heart,
and it was a very clarifying experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's eyes are shining bright with
positivity. I can tell she's feeling much better now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well. Let me try calming myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Stay calm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Clear the mind...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, I really would like more specific details.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Surely, there is protocol for how many seconds I
should bow?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It bothers me to no end that I don't know how
long to pray or ring the bell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is unable to pray in a way that meets
her standards and leaves the shrine with her
spirits sunk.
